name: yerros
description: Plugins by yerros — context engineering for AI-driven development.

plugins.name: context-forge
plugins.description: Set up and maintain the Context Forge methodology in any project: initialize context files, refine prompts, plan and build features, verify, debug, log decisions and lessons, audit for drift, compact for token budget, and resume via tiered context loading — with persistent memory and lightweight, token-free command hooks that auto-load the digest, record activity, flag budget overruns, and guard generated/protected files.
